name: Acolyte
description: You have spent your life in service to a temple, learning sacred rites and providing sacrifices to the god or gods you worship. Serving the gods and discovering their sacred works will be your life's calling.

feature.name: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
feature.description: You gain the Magic Initiate feat, choosing the Cleric spell list. This reflects your divine training and connection to the gods.

name: Artisan
description: You are a skilled craftsperson, mastering a particular trade and creating works of function and beauty. Your hands shape raw materials into finished goods, and your eye for detail is unmatched.

feature.name: Crafter
feature.description: You gain the Crafter feat, allowing you to create items more efficiently and with greater skill than ordinary artisans.

name: Charlatan
description: You have an ability to trick others into believing what benefits you most. As a charlatan, you fleece marks with clever scams and inventive cons, always staying one step ahead of the law.

feature.name: Skilled
feature.description: You gain the Skilled feat, reflecting the diverse talents you've developed to support your various schemes and identities.

name: Criminal
description: You have a history in the criminal underworld, whether as a thief, fence, or enforcer. You know the shadows and how to use them to your advantage.

feature.name: Alert
feature.description: You gain the Alert feat, making you exceptionally perceptive and difficult to surprise—a necessary trait for survival in your former profession.

name: Entertainer
description: You thrive in front of audiences, using your performance skills to delight, inspire, and captivate. You know how to read a crowd and give them what they want.

feature.name: Musician
feature.description: You gain the Musician feat, enhancing your ability to inspire others and create memorable performances.

name: Farmer
description: You have worked the land, tending crops and livestock through seasons of plenty and seasons of want. The rhythms of nature and the value of hard labor are ingrained in you.

feature.name: Tough
feature.description: You gain the Tough feat, representing the resilience and endurance developed through years of physical labor.

name: Guard
description: You have served as a guardian, protecting people and property from threats. Your watchful eye and readiness for trouble make you a reliable defender.

feature.name: Alert
feature.description: You gain the Alert feat, honing your vigilance and reaction time to better protect those under your watch.

name: Guide
description: You know the wilds intimately, leading travelers through dangerous territories and helping them survive nature's perils. The paths of the wilderness are written in your memory.

feature.name: Magic Initiate (Druid)
feature.description: You gain the Magic Initiate feat, choosing the Druid spell list, reflecting your deep connection to the natural world.

name: Hermit
description: You lived in seclusion, either in a sheltered community or in total isolation, for a formative part of your life. In your time apart from the clamor of society, you found a quiet contemplation that others seldom experience.

feature.name: Healer
feature.description: You gain the Healer feat, representing the medical knowledge you developed during your solitary existence.

name: Merchant
description: You are a trader of goods, traveling between communities to buy low and sell high. You understand the value of items and the art of negotiation.

feature.name: Lucky
feature.description: You gain the Lucky feat, reflecting the fortunate breaks and keen instincts that have helped you succeed in business.

name: Noble
description: You were born into privilege and status, part of the social elite. Your name opens doors that remain closed to others, and you carry yourself with the confidence of one who has never wanted for comfort.

feature.name: Skilled
feature.description: You gain the Skilled feat, reflecting the extensive education and training that noble upbringing provides.

name: Sage
description: You are a dedicated scholar, spending years poring over tomes and conducting research. Your quest for knowledge has led you to uncover secrets that others have long forgotten.

feature.name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
feature.description: You gain the Magic Initiate feat, choosing the Wizard spell list, reflecting your academic study of magical theory.

name: Sailor
description: You have spent your life on the water, whether on ships that cross the oceans or vessels that ply coastal waters. The sea is in your blood, and you know its moods and dangers.

feature.name: Tavern Brawler
feature.description: You gain the Tavern Brawler feat, representing your experience in portside brawls and rough-and-tumble shipboard life.

name: Scribe
description: You are a professional writer and record-keeper, skilled in the precise art of putting words to parchment. Your pen is your livelihood, and your attention to detail is impeccable.

feature.name: Skilled
feature.description: You gain the Skilled feat, reflecting the diverse knowledge and abilities you've developed through your work with texts and records.

name: Soldier
description: You have served in military campaigns, learning the discipline of formation fighting and the chaos of battle. War has forged you into a weapon.

feature.name: Savage Attacker
feature.description: You gain the Savage Attacker feat, representing the aggressive and decisive combat techniques honed on the battlefield.

name: Wayfarer
description: You are a traveler of the roads and paths, never staying in one place for long. You've seen more of the world than most, and you've learned to rely on your wits and adaptability.

feature.name: Lucky
feature.description: You gain the Lucky feat, reflecting the fortunate circumstances that have helped you survive your journeys and the instinct to seize opportunities.

name: Aberrant Heir
description: You carry the mark of aberrant magic in your bloodline, a heritage that sets you apart from others and grants you strange powers.

feature.name: Aberrant Dragonmark
feature.description: You possess an aberrant dragonmark, a strange and unpredictable magical brand that grants you unusual powers. This mark manifests in ways that are unique to you and often draws suspicion from others.

name: Anthropologist
description: You have spent your adult life away from your homeland, living among people different from your kin. You came to understand foreign cultures and their ways, eventually being treated as one of their own.

feature.name: Adept Linguist
feature.description: You can communicate with humanoids who don't speak any language you know. You must observe the humanoids interacting with one another for at least 1 day, after which you learn a handful of important words, expressions, and gestures—enough to communicate on a rudimentary level.

name: Archaeologist
description: You have spent your life uncovering the secrets of the past, delving into ancient ruins and deciphering lost languages to piece together history's greatest mysteries.

feature.name: Skilled
feature.description: Your extensive studies and field experience have honed your abilities. You gain proficiency in three skills of your choice, reflecting the diverse knowledge you've accumulated during your expeditions.

name: Astral Drifter
description: You have spent considerable time in the Astral Sea, where you aged little while years passed in the Material Plane. You crossed paths with wandering deities and witnessed cosmic wonders beyond mortal ken.
languages: Two of your choice (Celestial or Gith recommended)

feature.name: Divine Contact
feature.description: In the Astral Sea, you crossed paths with a wandering deity. The encounter was brief and nonviolent, yet it made a lasting impression on you. This deity saw fit to share one secret or obscure bit of cosmic lore with you. You also gain the Magic Initiate feat and must choose cleric for the feat.

name: Athlete
description: You have dedicated your life to athletic competition, honing your body to peak performance and earning fame in the games. Your discipline and training set you apart from ordinary competitors.
equipment: A bronze discus or leather ball
A lucky charm or past trophy

feature.name: Echoes of Victory
feature.description: You have attracted admiration among spectators, fellow athletes, and trainers in the region that hosted your past athletic victories. When visiting any settlement within 100 miles of where you grew up, there is a 50% chance you can find someone there who admires you and is willing to provide information or temporary shelter.

name: Carouser
description: You are a master of revelry and social gatherings, equally at home in the finest parties and the seediest taverns. Your charm and stamina make you the life of any celebration.

feature.name: Tireless Reveler
feature.description: You possess remarkable stamina when it comes to social activities. You can carouse through the night and still function normally the next day, and you have advantage on saving throws against becoming poisoned by alcohol.

name: City Watch
description: You have served in the city watch, protecting the streets and keeping the peace. Your duties have given you insight into both the criminal element and the lawful operations of urban centers.
equipment: A uniform in the style of your unit and indicative of your rank
A horn with which to summon help

feature.name: Watcher's Eye
feature.description: Your experience in enforcing the law, and dealing with lawbreakers, gives you a feel for local laws and criminals. You can easily find the local outpost of the watch or a similar organization, and just as easily pick out the dens of criminal activity in a community.

name: Variant City Watch (Investigator)
description: You have served in the city watch as an investigator, solving crimes and bringing offenders to justice through careful deduction and insight.
equipment: A uniform in the style of your unit and indicative of your rank
A horn with which to summon help

feature.name: Watcher's Eye
feature.description: Your experience in enforcing the law, and dealing with lawbreakers, gives you a feel for local laws and criminals. You can easily find the local outpost of the watch or a similar organization, and just as easily pick out the dens of criminal activity in a community.

name: Clan Crafter
description: You learned your craft as part of a dwarven clan or similar tight-knit community, where artisans are respected and their work is held to the highest standards.
languages: Dwarvish or one of your choice if you already speak Dwarvish
equipment: A set of artisan's tools with which you are proficient
A pouch containing 5 gp and a gem worth 10 gp

feature.name: Respect of the Stout Folk
feature.description: You always have free room and board in any place where shield dwarves or gold dwarves dwell, and the individuals in such a settlement might vie among themselves to determine who can offer you (and possibly your companions) the finest accommodations and assistance.

name: Cloistered Scholar
description: You have spent years in academic seclusion, immersed in study and research within the walls of a great library or university.
skill_proficiencies: One from Arcana, Nature, or Religion
equipment: The scholar's robes of your cloister
A writing kit (small pouch with a quill, ink, folded parchment, and a small penknife)
A borrowed book on the subject of your current study

feature.name: Library Access
feature.description: Though others must often endure extensive interviews and significant fees to gain access to even the most common archives in your library, you have free and easy access to the majority of the library. Additionally, you are likely to gain preferential treatment at other libraries across the Realms, as professional courtesy to a fellow scholar.

name: Cobalt Scholar
description: You are a member of the Cobalt Soul, an organization dedicated to the preservation and pursuit of knowledge. Your life is devoted to study, research, and the protection of truth.
equipment: A letter from a dead colleague posing a question you have not yet been able to answer

feature.name: Researcher
feature.description: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, if you do not know that information, you often know where and from whom you can obtain it. Usually, this information comes from a library, scriptorium, university, or a sage or other learned person or creature.

name: Courtier
description: You have navigated the treacherous waters of noble courts, learning the subtle arts of politics, intrigue, and diplomacy.

feature.name: Court Functionary
feature.description: Your knowledge of how bureaucracies function lets you gain access to the records and inner workings of any noble court or government you encounter. You know who the movers and shakers are, whom to go to for the favors you seek, and what the current intrigues of interest in the group are.

name: Custom Background
description: You have a unique history that doesn't fit any standard mold. Through your life experiences, you've developed a distinctive set of skills and abilities.
tool_proficiencies: Two of your choice (can be languages or tools)
equipment: The equipment package from any background

feature.name: Choose a Feature
feature.description: Choose a feature from any background that best represents your unique history and experiences.

name: Faction Agent
description: You serve as an agent for one of the powerful factions that shape the political landscape of the realms, working behind the scenes to advance your organization's goals.
skill_proficiencies: One Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma skill of your choice
equipment: Badge or emblem of your faction
A copy of a seminal faction text (or code-book for a covert faction)

feature.name: Safe Haven
feature.description: As a faction agent, you have access to a secret network of supporters and operatives who can provide assistance on your adventures. You know a set of secret signs and passwords you can use to identify such operatives, who can provide you with access to a hidden safe house, free room and board, or assistance in finding information.

name: Far Traveler
description: You have journeyed from a distant and exotic land, bringing with you the customs, traditions, and perspectives of a culture far removed from the familiar.
tool_proficiencies: Any one musical instrument or gaming set
equipment: Any one musical instrument or gaming set you are proficient with
Poorly wrought maps from your homeland that depict where you are
A small piece of jewelry worth 10 gp in the style of your homeland's craftsmanship

feature.name: All Eyes on You
feature.description: Your accent, mannerisms, figures of speech, and perhaps even your appearance all mark you as foreign. You can parley this attention into access to people and places you might not otherwise have, for you and your traveling companions. Noble lords, scholars, and merchant princes might be interested in hearing about your distant homeland and people.

name: Feylost
description: You spent time in the Feywild, whether by accident or design, and the experience has marked you in subtle and magical ways.
languages: One of Elvish, Gnomish, Goblin, or Sylvan

feature.name: Feywild Connection
feature.description: Your mannerisms and knowledge of fey customs are recognized by natives of the Feywild, who see you as one of their own. Because of this, friendly Fey creatures are inclined to come to your aid if you are lost or need help in the Feywild.

name: Fisher
description: You have spent your life working the waters, whether seas, rivers, or lakes, learning the ways of aquatic life and the patience required to harvest from the deep.
equipment: A favorite fishing lure or oiled leather wading boots

feature.name: Harvest the Water
feature.description: You gain advantage on ability checks made using fishing tackle. If you have access to a body of water that sustains marine life, you can maintain a moderate lifestyle while working as a fisher, and you can catch enough food to feed yourself and up to ten other people each day.

name: Folk Hero
description: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more. Already the people of your home village regard you as their champion, and your destiny calls you to stand against the tyrants and monsters that threaten the common folk everywhere.

feature.name: Rustic Hospitality
feature.description: Since you come from the ranks of the common folk, you fit in among them with ease. You can find a place to hide, rest, or recuperate among other commoners, unless you have shown yourself to be a danger to them. They will shield you from the law or anyone else searching for you, though they will not risk their lives for you.

name: Gate Warden
description: You have lived in a gate-town near a permanent portal to another plane, absorbing the essence radiating from the realm beyond and learning to navigate between worlds.
languages: Two of your choice (Abyssal, Celestial, or Infernal recommended)
equipment: A ring of keys to unknown locks

feature.name: Planar Infusion
feature.description: Living in a gate-town steeped you in planar energy. You gain the Scion of the Outer Planes feat. In addition, you know where to find free, modest lodging and food in the community you grew up in.

name: Giant Foundling
description: You were raised among giants, learning their ways and absorbing their culture. Though you are small by their standards, you carry the strength of your adopted people in your heart.
languages: One other language of your choice
equipment: A small stone or sprig that reminds you of home

feature.name: Strike of the Giants
feature.description: You gain the Strike of the Giants feat, reflecting the martial training and techniques you learned from your giant kin.

name: Grinner
description: You are a member of the Golden Grin, a secret network of spies and rebels who use performance and deception to fight against tyranny.
equipment: A musical instrument of your choice
A gold-plated ring depicting a smiling face

feature.name: Ballad of the Grinning Fool
feature.description: Like every Grinner, you know how to find a hideout. In any city of 10,000 people or more, you can play the 'Ballad of the Grinning Fool' in a major tavern or inn. A member of the Golden Grin will find you and give shelter to you and any companions you vouch for.

name: Guild Artisan
description: You are a member of an artisan's guild, skilled in a particular field and closely associated with other artisans. You are a well-established part of the mercantile world.
equipment: A letter of introduction from your guild

feature.name: Guild Membership
feature.description: As an established and respected member of a guild, you can rely on certain benefits that membership provides. Your fellow guild members will provide you with lodging and food if necessary, and pay for your funeral if needed. You must pay dues of 5 gp per month to the guild.

name: Haunted One
description: You are haunted by something beyond comprehension—a terrifying event, a monstrous entity, or a dark secret that has left an indelible mark on your soul.
skill_proficiencies: Two from Arcana, Investigation, Religion, or Survival
languages: Two, one of which must be Abyssal, Celestial, Deep Speech, Draconic, Infernal, Primordial, Sylvan, or Undercommon
equipment: One horror trinket of special significance

feature.name: Heart of Darkness
feature.description: Those who look into your eyes can see that you have faced unimaginable horror and that you are no stranger to darkness. Though they might fear you, commoners will extend you every courtesy and do their utmost to help you, even taking up arms to fight alongside you should you face an enemy alone.

name: House Agent
description: You serve as an agent for one of the great houses of Khorvaire, using your position to advance your house's interests while pursuing your own goals.

feature.name: Lucky
feature.description: You have the Lucky feat, allowing you to draw upon your house's fortune to influence events in your favor.

name: Inheritor
description: You have inherited something of great value—not necessarily monetary, but significant nonetheless. This inheritance shapes your destiny and draws you into adventure.
skill_proficiencies: One from Arcana, History, or Religion
tool_proficiencies: Your choice of a gaming set or a musical instrument
equipment: The tool you chose for this background

feature.name: Inheritance
feature.description: Choose or randomly determine your inheritance. Work with your DM to come up with details: Why is your inheritance so important, and what is its full story? The DM might use your inheritance as a story hook or determine that it has hidden properties that reveal themselves over time.

name: Inquisitive
description: You have a keen eye for detail and a mind that never rests, always seeking answers to mysteries and uncovering hidden truths.

feature.name: Alert
feature.description: You have the Alert feat, making you exceptionally perceptive and difficult to surprise. You gain a +5 bonus to initiative and can't be surprised while conscious.

name: Investigator
description: You are trained in the art of investigation, skilled at uncovering secrets, solving mysteries, and bringing criminals to justice.
skill_proficiencies: Two from Insight, Investigation, or Perception

feature.name: Official Inquiry
feature.description: You're experienced at gaining access to people and places to get the information you need. Through a combination of fast-talking, determination, and official-looking documentation, you can gain access to a place or an individual related to a crime you're investigating.

name: Knight of Solamnia
description: You are a member of the Knights of Solamnia, an order dedicated to honor, justice, and the protection of the innocent. Your training has prepared you for a life of chivalric adventure.

feature.name: Squire of Solamnia
feature.description: You gain the Squire of Solamnia feat. In addition, the Knights of Solamnia provide you free, modest lodging and food at any of their fortresses or encampments.

name: Knight of the Order
description: You belong to a knightly order, whether religious, civic, or philosophical, and you have sworn to uphold its ideals and protect its interests.
skill_proficiencies: One from Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion
tool_proficiencies: Your choice of a gaming set or a musical instrument
equipment: A signet, banner, or seal representing your place or rank in the order

feature.name: Knightly Regard
feature.description: You receive shelter and succor from members of your knightly order and those who are sympathetic to its aims. This help comes in the form of shelter and meals, and healing when appropriate, as well as occasionally risky assistance.

name: Lorwyn Expert
description: You are a skilled navigator and explorer of the wilds, able to find your way through the most treacherous terrain and survive where others would perish.

feature.name: Child of the Sun
feature.description: You have an innate connection to the sun and its cycles. You can always tell the time of day accurately when you can see the sky, and you have advantage on saving throws against exhaustion from prolonged exposure to sunlight.

name: Mage of High Sorcery
description: You are a member of the Mages of High Sorcery, an ancient and powerful organization dedicated to the study and regulation of magic.

feature.name: Initiate of High Sorcery
feature.description: You gain the Initiate of High Sorcery feat. In addition, the Mages of High Sorcery provide you with free, modest lodging and food indefinitely at any occupied Tower of High Sorcery and for one night at the home of an organization member.

name: Marine
description: You have served as a marine, a soldier trained to fight at sea as well as on land. Your experience has forged you into a resilient and dependable warrior.
equipment: A dagger that belonged to a fallen comrade
A folded flag emblazoned with the symbol of your ship or company

feature.name: Steady
feature.description: You can move twice the normal amount of time (up to 16 hours) each day before being subject to the effect of a forced march. Additionally, you can automatically find a safe route to land a boat on shore, provided such a route exists.

name: Mercenary Veteran
description: You have fought for coin across many lands, serving in countless companies and learning the harsh realities of the mercenary life.
equipment: A uniform of your company (traveler's clothes in quality)
A gaming set of your choice

feature.name: Mercenary Life
feature.description: You know the mercenary life as only someone who has experienced it can. You are able to identify mercenary companies by their emblems, and you know a little about any such company. You can find the taverns and festhalls where mercenaries abide in any area, as long as you speak the language.

name: Outlander
description: You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and the comforts of town and technology. You've witnessed the migration of herds larger than forests and survived weather more extreme than any city-dweller could comprehend.
equipment: A trophy from an animal you killed

feature.name: Wanderer
feature.description: You have an excellent memory for maps and geography, and you can always recall the general layout of terrain, settlements, and other features around you. In addition, you can find food and fresh water for yourself and up to five other people each day, provided that the land offers berries, small game, water, and so forth.

name: Planar Philosopher
description: You have dedicated your life to understanding the fundamental nature of the multiverse, studying the planes and the philosophies that seek to explain existence.
skill_proficiencies: One skill associated with your faction
equipment: A manifesto of your guiding philosophy
A set of common clothes in your faction's style
A pouch containing 10 gp worth of coins from different worlds and planes

feature.name: Conviction
feature.description: You gain the Scion of the Outer Planes feat. In addition, members of your organization provide you free, modest lodging and food at any of their holdings or the homes of other faction members.

name: Rune Carver
description: You are a master of ancient runes, able to carve symbols of power that can be used to enhance equipment, cast spells, or create magical effects.

feature.name: Rune Shaper
feature.description: You gain the Rune Shaper feat, allowing you to carve temporary runes that can enhance your equipment or cast spells.

name: Shadowmoor Expert
description: You have learned to navigate the treacherous Shadowmoor, a place of perpetual twilight where shadows hide dangers and secrets alike.

feature.name: Shadowmoor Hexer
feature.description: You have learned minor shadow magic that allows you to obscure your presence or create areas of dim light, even in bright conditions.

name: Shipwright
description: You are a skilled builder and repairer of ships, knowing the secrets of naval architecture and the ways of the sea.
equipment: A set of well-loved carpenter's tools

feature.name: I'll Patch It!
feature.description: Provided you have carpenter's tools and wood, you can perform repairs on a water vehicle. When you use this ability, you restore a number of hit points to the hull of a water vehicle equal to 5 × your proficiency modifier.

name: Smuggler
description: You have made your living moving goods that others don't want moved—or don't want known—across borders and past authorities.
equipment: A fancy leather vest or a pair of leather boots

feature.name: Down Low
feature.description: You are acquainted with a network of smugglers who are willing to help you out of tight situations. While in a particular town, city, or other similarly sized community, you and your companions can stay for free in safe houses, providing a poor lifestyle and allowing you to keep your presence a secret.

name: Urban Bounty Hunter
description: You track down individuals for pay, using your knowledge of the urban environment and your connections to find those who don't want to be found.
skill_proficiencies: Two from Deception, Insight, Persuasion, or Stealth
tool_proficiencies: Two from gaming set, musical instrument, or thieves' tools
equipment: A set of clothes appropriate to your duties

feature.name: Ear to the Ground
feature.description: You are in frequent contact with people in the segment of society that your chosen quarries move through. This connection comes in the form of a contact in any city you visit, a person who provides information about the people and places of the local area.

name: Urchin
description: You grew up on the streets alone, orphaned, and poor. You had no one to watch over you or to provide for you, so you learned to provide for yourself.
equipment: A map of the city you grew up in
A token to remember your parents by

feature.name: City Secrets
feature.description: You know the secret patterns and flow to cities and can find passages through the urban sprawl that others would miss. When you are not in combat, you (and companions you lead) can travel between any two locations in the city twice as fast as your speed would normally allow.

name: Uthgardt Tribe Member
description: You are a member of one of the Uthgardt tribes, barbarian peoples who follow ancient traditions and revere the spirits of nature and their totems.
tool_proficiencies: One type of musical instrument or artisan's tools
equipment: A totemic token or set of tattoos marking your loyalty to Uthgar and your tribal totem

feature.name: Uthgardt Heritage
feature.description: You have an excellent knowledge of not only your tribe's territory, but also the terrain and natural resources of the rest of the North. You can find twice as much food and water as you normally would when you forage there. Additionally, you can call upon the hospitality of your people and those allied with your tribe.

name: Waterdhavian Noble
description: You were born into one of the noble houses of Waterdeep, the City of Splendors, and your name carries weight throughout the North.
tool_proficiencies: One type of gaming set or musical instrument
equipment: A skin of fine zzar or wine

feature.name: Kept in Style
feature.description: While you are in Waterdeep or elsewhere in the North, your house sees to your everyday needs. Your name and signet are sufficient to cover most of your expenses, allowing you to live a comfortable lifestyle without having to pay for it.

name: Wildspacer
description: You have spent significant time in Wildspace, the vast expanse between worlds, facing its terrors and learning to survive in the void.

feature.name: Wildspace Adaptation
feature.description: You gain the Tough feat. In addition, you learned how to adapt to zero gravity. Being weightless doesn't give you disadvantage on any of your melee attack rolls.

name: Witchlight Hand
description: You are or were a member of the Witchlight Carnival, a magical traveling show that brings wonder and joy to all who visit.
tool_proficiencies: Disguise kit or one type of musical instrument
equipment: A disguise kit or a musical instrument

feature.name: Carnival Fixture
feature.description: The Witchlight Carnival provides you with free, modest lodging and food. In addition, you may wander about the carnival and partake of its many wonders at no cost to you, provided you don't disrupt its shows or cause any other trouble.
